query_lot_history.description: 查询 LotHistory，真实环境请替换成你们的表名和字段名
query_lot_history.sql: select lot_id, event_time, module, rule_name, server_ip, message from lot_history where lot_id = :lot_id order by event_time desc limit 50

query_lot_module.description: 查询 lot 当前归属模块
query_lot_module.sql: select lot_id, module, updated_at from lot_module where lot_id = :lot_id order by updated_at desc limit 10

query_rule_execution.description: 根据 lotId 和 ruleName 查询 rule 执行服务器、模块、时间
query_rule_execution.sql: select lot_id, rule_name, env, server_ip, module, handled_at from rule_execution where lot_id = :lot_id and rule_name = :rule_name order by handled_at desc limit 20
